untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'trendline turns up/down' and 'first oversold condition following upturn', which require multi-bar pattern recognition and state tracking not expressible as single-bar indicator comparisons. The allowed indicator set contains no trendline indicator, and the sequencing logic (oversold AFTER upturn) cannot be expressed with simple operators on current-bar indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to map 3-day raw stochastic (stoch_k_5 is closest available 5-period stochastic proxy) to oversold threshold ~20, but the core logic depends on: (1) detecting trendline direction changes, (2) sequencing the oversold condition after the upturn occurs, and (3) exiting on trendline reversal. These require state machines or multi-bar lookback logic outside the allowed operator set.
